proof:
---- MODULE Counter ----
EXTENDS Naturals
VARIABLE x
Init == x = 0
Next == /\ x < 5 /\ x' = x + 1
====

---- MODULE Toggle ----
VARIABLE on
Init == on = FALSE
Next == on' = /\ on /\ TRUE
====

---- MODULE TwoPhase ----
VARIABLE state
Init == state = "idle"
Next == /\ state = "idle" /\ state' = "prepare"
====

---- MODULE Queue ----
EXTENDS Naturals
VARIABLE len
Init == len = 0
Next == /\ len < 10 /\ len' = len + 1
====

---- MODULE Mutex ----
VARIABLE held
Init == held = FALSE
Next == /\ ~held /\ held' = TRUE
====

---- MODULE Traffic ----
VARIABLE color
Init == color = "red"
Next == /\ color = "red" /\ color' = "green"
====

---- MODULE Resource ----
EXTENDS Naturals
VARIABLE n
Init == n = 3
Next == /\ n > 0 /\ n' = n - 1
====

---- MODULE Latch ----
VARIABLE v
Init == v = 0
Next == v' = v
====
